content.explanation:
**Revision Day 3 — Days 21-30 ka Complete Review:**

आज हम पिछले 10 दिनों के सभी Advanced Modal Verbs का revision करेंगे।

**Day 21: Used To** = पहले करता था
"I used to play cricket." (now I don't)

**Day 22: Could** = Past ability / Polite request
"I could swim as a child." / "Could you help me?"

**Day 23: Should Have** = काश किया होता
"I should have called earlier."

**Day 24: Must Have** = ज़रूर हुआ होगा (99% certainty)
"He must have forgotten."

**Day 25: Could Have** = हो सकता था (missed opportunity)
"I could have won."

**Day 26: Would Have** = होता (imaginary past, 3rd conditional)
"If I had studied, I would have passed."

**Day 27: May Have** = शायद हुआ हो (50% past possibility)
"She may have left already."

**Day 28: Might Have** = शायद हुआ हो (30% — less certain)
"He might have taken a different route."

**Day 29: Will / Shall** = Future tense
"I will come." / "Shall we begin?"

**Day 30: Would / Ought To / Dare**
"Would you help?" / "You ought to be honest." / "How dare you!"
rules: Used to + V1 = Past habit (no longer happening)
Could + V1 = Past ability; Could you? = Polite request
Should have / Could have / Would have / Must have + V3 = Perfect modals
Must have = 99% certain; May have = 50%; Might have = 30%
Will + V1 = Future; Shall = formal offers/suggestions
Ought to + V1 = moral duty (must have "to" unlike other modals)
content.memoryTrick:
**Perfect Modal Formula: Subject + [Modal] + have + V3**
Must have / Could have / Should have / Would have / May have / Might have — सब ने V3 चाहिए!

examples.hindi: मैं बचपन में बहुत तेज़ दौड़ता था।
examples.english: I used to run very fast in childhood.

examples.hindi: क्या आप यह document send कर सकते हैं?
examples.english: Could you please send this document?

examples.hindi: मुझे पहले उसे inform करना चाहिए था।
examples.english: I should have informed him earlier.

examples.hindi: वह ज़रूर बहुत busy रही होगी।
examples.english: She must have been very busy.

examples.hindi: तुम कम से कम message कर सकते थे।
examples.english: You could have at least messaged.

examples.hindi: अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो pass हो जाता।
examples.english: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.

examples.hindi: शायद उसने अभी तक reply नहीं किया हो।
examples.english: He may not have replied yet.

examples.hindi: वह शायद train miss कर गई हो।
examples.english: She might have missed the train.

mistakes.why: Perfect modals always need V3 (past participle)

mistakes.wrong: If I would have known, I would have helped.
mistakes.correct: If I had known, I would have helped.

mistakes.why: Ought TO + V1 — 'to' is always required

speakingTips: हर perfect modal पर 2 sentences बनाओ — आज 14 sentences का target रखो
Record करो और check करो कि V3 सही use हुई या नहीं
एक दोस्त के साथ roleplay करो — past situations discuss करो

vocabulary.example: I used to have good habits.

alternatives: he is a very good person.

practice.english: Yesterday the weather was very cold.
alternatives: the weather was very cold yesterday.

practice.hindi: मेरे पास पहले एक साइकिल थी।
alternatives: i used to have a bicycle.

practice.hindi: जब वह स्टेशन पहुँचा, ट्रेन जा चुकी थी।
practice.english: When he reached the station, the train had already left.
alternatives: by the time he reached, the train had left.

practice.hindi: क्या मैं यहाँ बैठ सकता हूँ?

practice.english: I should have done this earlier.
alternatives: i ought to have done this before.

practice.hindi: काश मैंने यह पहले सीखा होता।
practice.english: I wish I had learned this earlier.
alternatives: i wish i had studied this before.

practice.hindi: मैं एक नई नौकरी चाहता हूँ।
alternatives: i want to find a new job.

practice.hindi: मैं एक कप चाय लेना चाहूँगा।
practice.english: I would like to have a cup of tea.
alternatives: i would like a cup of tea.

practice.hindi: वह पहले बहुत तेज़ दौड़ सकता था।
practice.english: He could run very fast before.
alternatives: he was able to run fast before.

practice.hindi: शायद वह कल आ सकती है।

practice.english: You will have to see a doctor.

practice.hindi: वह जाने की हिम्मत नहीं कर सका।
alternatives: he did not dare to go.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम मेरी मदद करना चाहोगे?
practice.english: Would you like to help me?

practice.hindi: मैं अंग्रेज़ी में बात करना सीख रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I am learning to speak in English.
alternatives: i am learning to talk in english.

practice.hindi: वह हर सुबह योग करता है।

practice.english: We will go to Delhi tomorrow.
alternatives: we are going to delhi tomorrow.

practice.hindi: बच्चे पार्क में खेल रहे थे।
practice.english: The children were playing in the park.

practice.hindi: मैं यह काम तीन घंटे से कर रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I have been doing this work for three hours.
alternatives: i have been working on this for three hours.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे कभी धोखा नहीं दिया।

alternatives: he is a very good person.
